decision_summary: v7.0 release closure is approved after verification completes.
rationale: The release surface now matches the implemented v7.0 slices: session event stream, session observability audit, Mission Control projection, and mission-control operator entrypoint. The boundary remains reconstructability, not semantic truth.
recommendation: Run the full release verification set, update the checklist with green evidence, close TASK-088, then tag v7.0.0.
expected_user_reaction: Use v7.0 when session-level reconstruction of AI work is required.
artifact_change_recommendations: Keep docs/v7.0-release-definition.md as the release contract and docs/vnext-release-plan.md as the v7.1 frontier.
organization_change_recommendations: Move active release state to v7.0.0 and keep v7.1 as next context/reference integrity work.
